appraisal_events.evidence: Il compare l’église de Balbec de façon dépréciative aux « véritables bijoux ciselés » que sont Reims, Chartres et « la perle de toutes, la Sainte-Chapelle », et relègue Balbec au rang de visite « si un jour de pluie vous ne savez que faire ».
appraisal_events.explanation: Through his assured and ranked judgments on styles and monuments, the interlocutor locally sets himself up as an arbiter of aesthetic authority, which elevates him rhetorically in the scene.

status_effects.explanation: His critical assurance and the ranking of the churches reinforce his position as an expert in the exchange.
